stem: A public health study surveys 20 residents surveyed and observes 2 positive outcomes out of 20 (10.0%). Estimate the true vaccination coverage and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.1. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0279, 0.301]. Point estimate: 0.1645.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
Not recognizing that with n=20, the normal approximation may be poor
